tasks.title: Scaffold Next.js 15 app with Tailwind, shadcn, Bun, Biome
tasks.notes: create-next-app, configure strict TS, Biome, shadcn init, dark mode default, add framer-motion + fuse.js + next-pwa

tasks.title: Define flashcard TypeScript schema + Zod validator + content loader
tasks.notes: Schema from ENRICHED_SPEC. Loader reads /content/cs/flashcards/**/*.json at build time. Topic-config driven for future finance swap.

tasks.title: Home page with mixed mode (daily review CTA + topic grid + mock entry)
tasks.notes: Dark mode default. Progress rings use CSS conic-gradient. Read SRS state from localStorage.

tasks.title: Swipe flashcard viewer with Framer Motion + SM-2 lite SRS
tasks.notes: Swipe left=hard right=easy up=medium tap=flip. SM-2 lite: ease factor, interval, next review date. localStorage key per card id. Filter bar topic+difficulty+due-only.

tasks.title: Topic detail pages (MDX + embedded deck)
tasks.notes: MDX from /content/cs/topics/. Embed topic flashcards at bottom.

tasks.title: Cmd+K search with Fuse.js across all flashcards
tasks.notes: shadcn Command component. Search front+back+tags. Jump to card or topic.

tasks.title: Mock interview mode with chrono + reveal
tasks.notes: Pool from flashcards flagged mock-eligible (difficulty hard). Timer 2-5min configurable. Reveal + self-rate.

tasks.title: PWA manifest + service worker for offline
tasks.notes: next-pwa or manual SW. Cache shell + all /content/ JSON. Install prompt.

tasks.title: Author 120 flashcards: algos & data structures
tasks.notes: Arrays, hashmaps, trees, graphs, DP, greedy, sorting, searching, big-O, patterns (two pointers, sliding window, BFS/DFS, union-find, segment tree, trie). Each card must have senior_nuance. Mix easy/medium/hard.

tasks.title: Author 100 flashcards: system design + scaling
tasks.notes: CAP, PACELC, consistent hashing, sharding, consensus (Raft, Paxos), leader election, CDN, rate limiting, circuit breakers, caching layers, load balancing (L4/L7), pub/sub vs queues, idempotency, at-least-once/at-most-once/exactly-once. Include canonical design questions (URL shortener, rate limiter, feed, chat, ride-share). Quote-ready tradeoffs.

tasks.title: Author 80 flashcards: backend / infra / DevOps
tasks.notes: Postgres (indexes, MVCC, isolation levels, EXPLAIN), Redis, Kafka, K8s (pods, deploys, services, ingress, HPA), Docker, CI/CD, Terraform/IaC, observability (Prometheus, Grafana, RED/USE, tracing, structured logging), SRE concepts (SLO/SLI/SLA, error budget), HTTP/2/3, gRPC, REST vs GraphQL, auth (OAuth, OIDC, JWT pitfalls).

tasks.title: Author 80 flashcards: blockchain / smart contract
tasks.notes: Solidity (reentrancy, integer overflow pre-0.8, delegatecall, storage collisions, ERC-20/721/1155), Sui Move (abilities, objects, PTB, shared vs owned), Solana (accounts, PDAs, rent, CPI, Anchor), ZK (Groth16, PLONK, trusted setup, circuits, Nova), MEV, bridges, L2s (rollups optimistic vs zk), consensus variants (PoS, BFT). Security patterns CEI, access control, oracle manipulation.

tasks.title: Author 60 flashcards: ML / AI engineering
tasks.notes: Classical ML (bias/variance, regularization, cross-val, metrics), neural net basics, transformers, LLMs (context window, attention, KV cache, fine-tuning vs RAG, LoRA, quantization), RAG (chunking, embeddings, vector DBs Pinecone/Weaviate/pgvector, hybrid search, reranking), MLOps (feature store, model registry, drift, canary, shadow), evals (golden sets, LLM-as-judge pitfalls), prompt engineering signals.

tasks.title: Author 60 flashcards + topic page: Mysten Labs
tasks.notes: Read MYSTEN_RESEARCH.md. Cover Sui object model, Move specifics, Mysticeti consensus, Walrus, DeepBook, zkLogin, Prometheus+Grafana observability for Sui nodes (RED/USE, PromQL examples, block height lag, peer count, finality latency). Include 20+ tailored interview questions with senior-quality answers. Use opus for this — judgment-heavy.

tasks.title: Author 50 flashcards: senior signals, tradeoffs, red flags
tasks.notes: Quote-ready phrases: 'I'd start by clarifying the access pattern before picking a data store', 'SLOs before features', 'The first question is what does failure look like here', etc. War story templates. Red flags to avoid (over-engineering, premature abstraction, ignoring ops). Architecture decision phrases. Use opus for phrasing quality.

tasks.title: Author 50 flashcards: OS + networks + concurrency + security classics
tasks.notes: OS (processes vs threads, virtual memory, paging, scheduling, syscalls, signals), networks (OSI, TCP vs UDP, TLS handshake, DNS, HTTP/2/3, QUIC, NAT), concurrency (mutex vs semaphore, deadlock, race, memory model, happens-before, MVCC), security (OWASP top 10, SQLi, XSS, CSRF, SSRF, password hashing, crypto basics, JWT pitfalls).

tasks.title: STAR story templates + interviewer questions + negotiation tips
tasks.notes: STAR templates: Leadership, Conflict, Failure, Impact, Ambiguity, Disagreement, Ownership, Scaling a system. Each with placeholders. Questions to ask interviewer (senior-signal: oncall, tech debt, roadmap, why they joined). Negotiation phrases (competing offer framing, total comp vs base, signing bonus ask). Use opus — phrasing matters.

tasks.title: Seed a minimal set of 30 cards across topics before big content authoring
tasks.notes: Bootstrap so UI has content to test against before big authoring agents finish. 30 cards, 3-5 per topic.

tasks.title: Functional QA: swipe viewer works on mobile viewport
tasks.notes: Puppeteer mobile viewport 390x844. Navigate /review. Verify swipe gestures, tap to flip, localStorage persistence. Screenshots saved.

tasks.title: GitHub repo + push + Vercel deploy
tasks.notes: gh repo create alexandremourot/interview-prep-cs --public --source=. --push. Then vercel --prod (assume vercel CLI logged in — if not, log to PROBLEMS.md).

tasks.title: Write scripts/e2e-test.ts for functional verification gate
tasks.notes: Puppeteer: navigate deployed URL, check home loads, click 'Start review', verify card renders, simulate swipe, verify localStorage updated. Exit 0/1.

tasks.title: Write README.md (English)
tasks.notes: Scope, stack, commands (bun dev, build, lint), how to add flashcards, how to swap content set (cs → finance), deployed URL.
